author: boma_naps
content: Cross posting to get CL dev input on standardizing default JWT secret paths https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/297  would simplify user setup by removing need for manual --jwt-secret configuration. Looking for client team positions: https://github.com/ethereum/pm/issues/1941#issuecomment-3984157106

author: tersec
content: I'd have to check, but I'm not sure if Nimbus still supported this, since it was kind of useless at the time with zero EL support for years. but it doesn't seem broadly unreasonable

author: tersec
content: it was (at the time) a non-standard which interop'd with no one and nothing

author: tersec
content: that's not an issue with the proposal though, that's an issue with the standardization-status of it

author: tersec
content: but. I'd distinguish between fixed jwt-secret _paths_ and fixed jwt secrets

author: tersec
content: the former gets quickly into OS-dependent stuff

author: tersec
content: the latter has tradeoffs but at least doesn't
